identity.name: Freddy's
identity.description: AI-powered CV builder that creates professional, ATS-optimized resumes in minutes. Built for job seekers, career changers, and recruiters.

capabilities.name: Create CV
capabilities.description: Generate a professional, ATS-optimized CV from structured input data. Supports multiple templates and languages.

inputs.name: personal_info
inputs.description: Name, email, phone, location, LinkedIn URL

inputs.name: experience
inputs.description: Array of work experience entries with company, role, dates, and descriptions

inputs.name: education
inputs.description: Array of education entries with institution, degree, dates

inputs.name: template
inputs.description: Template ID (default: 'professional'). Options: professional, modern, minimal, creative, executive

outputs.name: cv_id
outputs.description: Unique identifier for the generated CV

outputs.name: cv_url
outputs.description: URL to view and edit the CV

outputs.name: pdf_url
outputs.description: Direct download link for PDF format

outputs.name: docx_url
outputs.description: Direct download link for DOCX format

experience.description: Led a team of 5 engineers building distributed systems

capabilities.name: Optimize CV for Job Listing
capabilities.description: Analyze a CV against a specific job listing and suggest optimizations for ATS compatibility and keyword matching.

inputs.name: cv_id
inputs.description: ID of an existing CV to optimize

inputs.name: job_url
inputs.description: URL of the job listing to optimize for

inputs.name: job_description
inputs.description: Raw job description text (alternative to job_url)

outputs.name: optimized_cv_id
outputs.description: ID of the optimized CV version

capabilities.name: List Templates
capabilities.description: Get all available CV templates with previews.

outputs.name: templates
outputs.description: Array of template objects with id, name, preview_url, and description

capabilities.name: Generate Cover Letter
capabilities.description: Generate a tailored cover letter based on a CV and job listing.

inputs.name: cv_id
inputs.description: ID of the CV to base the cover letter on

inputs.name: job_url
inputs.description: URL of the target job listing

outputs.name: cover_letter_id
outputs.description: Unique ID for the cover letter

protocols.description: Primary REST API for all CV operations
MCP server for direct AI agent integration — supports all CV capabilities
OpenAPI specification for the REST API
Web application for manual CV creation and management

free_tier.limits: 3 CVs per month, basic templates only, PDF export

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: For active job seekers who need the full toolkit

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: For recruiters, HR teams, and career services

faq.question: What file formats does Freddy's support for export?
faq.answer: We export CVs in PDF, DOCX, and HTML formats. Cover letters are available in PDF and plain text.

faq.question: How does ATS optimization work?
faq.answer: Our AI analyzes job listings to identify key skills, keywords, and formatting requirements, then suggests changes to maximize ATS compatibility scores.

faq.question: Is my data stored securely?
faq.answer: All CV data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). Data is stored in Singapore and can be permanently deleted at any time from your account settings.

faq.question: Can agents create CVs on behalf of users?
faq.answer: Yes. Use the MCP server or REST API with proper OAuth2 authentication. The user must authorize the agent via the standard OAuth2 flow.

use_cases.title: Automated job application
use_cases.description: An AI agent can create a tailored CV for each job listing, optimize it for ATS, and generate a matching cover letter — all through the API.

use_cases.title: Career coaching platforms
use_cases.description: Career coaching tools can integrate Freddy's to offer CV creation as part of their coaching workflow.

use_cases.title: Recruitment agencies
use_cases.description: Recruiters can bulk-generate standardized CVs from candidate data using the Enterprise API.

limitations: Image uploads limited to 5MB per file
Cover letters are AI-generated and should be reviewed before submission
Multi-language translation is AI-powered and may require manual review for specialized terminology

sla.response_time: < 500ms p95 for API calls, < 10s for CV generation

related.description: Import professional profile data from LinkedIn
Developer community that builds with the Freddy's API

alternatives.name: Resume.io
alternatives.differentiator: Freddy's specializes in AI-powered ATS optimization and multi-language support for the APAC market

alternatives.name: Novoresume
alternatives.differentiator: Freddy's offers full API access and MCP integration for AI agent workflows
